docket_entries.description: SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO PAUL CARSON
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 55.00 - SERVED MAY-28-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CARSON, PAUL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-01-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SANTANA, CHRISTOPHER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARSON, PAUL $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,105.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SANTANA, CHRISTOPHER AS TO DEFENDANT CARSON, PAUL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-01-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-01-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-01-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF APR-26-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO APPEARANCES; JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL MAU; CLERK: B. PAREDES; NOT REPORTED. 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CARSON, PAUL
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT CARSON, PAUL HEARING SET FOR APR-26-2018 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: ORDER OF EXAMINATION OFF CALENDAR (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
